'''Ondaran willek juice''' was an intoxicating [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] [[Foodstuff/Legends|juice]]<ref name="KOTOR" /> that originated in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Ondara system/Legends|Ondara system]], a part of the [[Lantillian sector/Legends|Lantillian sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Kashyyyk Region]] of<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Jolee Bindo]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who became a [[Hermit/Legends|hermit]] after crashlanding on<ref name="KOTOR" /> the [[Mytaranor sector/Legends|Mytaranor sector]]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]<ref name="KOTOR" /> around [[3976 BBY]],<ref name="3976 BBY">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', which include [[Jolee Bindo]] ending his twenty-[[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[Hermit/Legends|hermitage]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], to [[3956 BBY]].</ref> was familiar with the beverage.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Elusive? Me, elusive? Heh. Obviously you've never tried to grab a Twi'lek dancing girl after drinking too much Ondaran willek juice.|Jolee Bindo, in a possible conversation that the player character, Revan, can have in ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic''|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
Ondaran willek juice was introduced in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. In the game, the beverage can be mentioned in one version of an optional conversation the player character, [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], can have with Jolee Bindo. In the dialogue, Revan can question Bindo's perceived elusivity in talking about his motives for joining the former's travels through [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. In response, the amused Bindo states that Revan's choice of words implies that they "obviously" have not at any point consumed an excessive amount of Ondaran willek juice and subsequently attempted to grab a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing [[Gender/Legends|girl]].<ref name="KOTOR" />
